trace_id.description: Unique identifier for the trace record.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the trace record was created.

action_request.description: Original request from the agent or system to perform an external action.

decision.description: Compliance decision rendered for the action request.

merkle.description: Canonical chain linkage. Useful for rollback and verification.

root.description: Merkle root for this trace entry.

prev.description: Previous Merkle root in the chain (NULL/empty for head).

index.description: Optional chain index number for operational convenience.

token.description: Opaque token or signature for proof.

approved_at.description: UTC timestamp when approval was given.

execution_result.description: Result after executing the action (if executed).

metadata.description: Implementation-specific metadata (status codes, request IDs, etc.).

meta.description: Extra fields useful for lookup without polluting canonical structures.
